title: Wintercraft Fabric
description: Classic performance based Vanilla Modpack, which is created for our german based public minecraft server.
body:
Wintercraft is a client-sided performance improvement modpack, which is optimized for the community server we launch. It offers a veriety of performance modpacks such as 
```
Entity Culling
FerriteCore
ImmediatelyFast
Let Me Despawn
```
but it also offers a great variety of Quality of Life Mods such as 
```
Jade
Mod Menu
Sodium
Iris
Controlling
Simple Voice Chat
```

If you want to join us on our journey. Go to wintercraft.community and sign up via the provided form.
